global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with text and shapes that promote a streaming service.
global.main_message: Promoting new music hits available for streaming.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'NeonCast' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A prominent text area in the center displaying 'Stream the hype' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that reads 'New hits every week', complementing the headline.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A circular shape in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the main message.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center, providing a backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned near the bottom, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Additional rectangle
elements.description: Another rectangular shape that adds depth to the composition.

elements.label: Small element
elements.description: A small element positioned towards the bottom, details unclear.

elements.label: Another small element

elements.label: Main message text
